memoryArtifacts.headline: Mary de Bohun
memoryArtifacts.description:
Mary de Bohun (c. 1368 – 4 June 1394) was the first wife of King Henry IV of England and the mother of King Henry V. Mary was never queen, as she died before her husband came to the throne.



Con …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Bohun於1368年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Humphrey Bohun26歲，母親Joan FitzAlan21歲。她於1380年7月27日與Henry IV King of England在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年7月4日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾比特爾波洛享年26歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Bohun于1368年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Humphrey Bohun26岁，母亲Joan FitzAlan21岁。她于1380年7月27日与Henry IV King of England在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年7月4日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾比特爾波洛享年26岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Bohun was born in 1368, in Essex, England, her father, Humphrey Bohun, was 26 and her mother, Joan FitzAlan, was 21. She married Henry IV King of England on 27 July 1380, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 July 1394, in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

fr.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Bohun est née en 1368, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Bohun, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzAlan, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Henry IV King of England le 27 juillet 1380, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1394, à Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Bohun 1368 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Bohun 26 und ihre Mutter Joan FitzAlan 21. Sie hat am 27. Juli 1380 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Henry IV King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1394 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Bohun è nata il nel 1368 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Humphrey Bohun, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan FitzAlan, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Henry IV King of England il 27 luglio 1380, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1394, nel Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Bohunが1368年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Humphrey Bohunは26歳，母Joan FitzAlanは21歳であった。1380年7月27日にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでHenry IV King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年7月4日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアペテルボロウで26歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Bohun(이)가 1368년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Bohun(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan FitzAlan(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1380년 7월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 Henry IV King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 피터버루에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Bohun nasceu em 1368, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Bohun, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzAlan, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry IV King of England em 27 de julho de 1380, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1394, em Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Bohun родилась в 1368 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Bohun было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzAlan, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry IV King of England 27 июля 1380 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 июля 1394 г. в местности питирбороую, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Bohun nació en 1368, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Bohun, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan FitzAlan, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Henry IV King of England el 27 de julio de 1380, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1394, en Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
